reviews.comment:
Buena atención del personal
Es muy limpio el lugar. Tiene un area de descanso con juegos para niños. Hay parrillas atras del establecimiento. Los baños mu limpios

(Translated by Google)
Excellent staff service. The place is very clean. It has a rest area with a children's playground. There are grills behind the establishment. The restrooms are very clean.
